name: mem0-context-loader
tagline: Pre-fetches relevant mem0 memories to prime an agent's context before starting a task.
verdict: Read-only, deterministic memory search with a clear output format and a sensible silent-on-empty default. Weak points: no stated out-of-scope guidance so it could misfire on adjacent tasks, no version/changelog signal, and no fallback if the search tool itself fails.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' or exclusion guidance anywhere in description or body; could misfire on adjacent context-loading tasks.
Only the zero-results failure path is addressed; no guidance if search_memories itself fails or is unavailable.
No version field in frontmatter and no changelog/dated revision notes anywhere in the file.
